title: mangifera havilandii
intro: Mangifera havilandii, also known as the Borneo mango or Haviland's mango, is a species of flowering plant in the cashew family, Anacardiaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its bark, roots, and leaves containing compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mangifera havilandii include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. Mangifera havilandii can be prepared as herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
